pkgmetadata.longdescription: Installs the development and evidence-gathering environment used by the Prismdrake Gentoo reference VM. This package is not a Prismdrake runtime package and does not select or accept an architectural decision.

use.flag: Install Clang for optional compiler-matrix coverage.
Install native debuggers, tracing tools, and process inspection utilities.
Install candidate parser, D-Bus, and C++ test libraries for approved implementation work.
Install tools for local repository QA and Portage inspection.
Install Qt 6 modules used by the isolated visible-shell evidence spike.
Install the optional image-comparison tool used by deterministic visual tests.
Install the X11, D-Bus, accessibility, software-rendering, and deterministic display harness.
